news.headline: Third Ukrainian strike hits Russian oil refinery and prompts evacuations
news.summary: Residents near a burning refinery in Tuapse are told to leave, and the Kremlin accuses Kyiv of destabilising global energy markets.

news.headline: With Meta-Manus AI deal ‘difficult’ to undo, how will Beijing exert its authority?
news.summary:
It could be “time-consuming”, “complex” and “difficult” for Meta Platforms to unwind its acquisition of Manus, an artificial intelligence start-up that originated in China, given how far the deal has gone, according to analysts.
